PAYWALL.TITLE: Upgrade to use Kanban
PAYWALL.DESCRIPTION: The Kanban feature requires a fazer.ai Chatwoot Pro subscription.
PAYWALL.UPGRADE_PROMPT: Subscribe to fazer.ai Chatwoot Pro to access Kanban funnels, task management, and workflow automation.
PAYWALL.NON_ADMIN_MESSAGE: The Kanban feature is not available on your current plan. Please reach out to your administrator to upgrade.
